title.en: CLEANING IN GENERAL; PREVENTION OF FOULING IN GENERAL

characterised by the type of cleaning tool

by movement of cleaning members over a surface

using chambers or hoods covering the area {(B08B15/002 takes precedence)}
from a small area, e.g. a tool {(removing chips B23Q11/0042)}
